spans.text: mid undistinguished trees , White dots of gleamy domes
white with passing sunshine , there with trees Innumerable shaded , clustering more
white with passing sunshine , there with trees Innumerable shaded , clustering more
with trees Innumerable shaded , clustering more
Which now the inmost heart like music
he hears her gently say , Live , live
I hear bid welcome to thy vales And woods again
bid welcome to thy vales And woods again
fade the farthest hills Which bound the blue lap of the swelling vale
the farthest hills Which bound the blue lap of the swelling vale
the blue lap of the swelling vale
to rest , till back recalled By yonder ivied cloisters in the plain , Whose turret , peeping pale above the shade , Smiles in the venerable grace of years
pale above the shade , Smiles in the venerable grace of years
that so my age , When many a circling season has declined , In charity and peace may wait its close
Soothing companion of my vacant hours
Soothing companion of my vacant hours
the fatherless Of the loved village where my bones
